data.name: Halloween SEX Party [18+]
data.detailed_description:
[h1]An exciting 18+ horror sex adventure awaits you![/h1]
Halloween SEX Party [18+] is a casual game with original puzzle mechanics based on runners.
To experience the whole journey with our sexy girls you have to win a variety of levels by finding the escape of levels.



Instead of controlling the character outright, you have to interact with the environment to move through the levels.
Unlock the doors, avoid traps, and destroy your enemies before they do you damage.



[h1]Game Features:[/h1]
  • 10 sex scenes with Live2D animations! You will be able to interact with every girl.
  • Unique puzzle mechanic based on runners
  • Dive deep into our Halloween girls' personalities & go through the story together with them.
  • Experience the Halloween Horror theme and reveal the truth alongside our main Heroines!

[h1] All characters are over 18 years old [/h1]

data.short_description: An exciting 18+ horror sex adventure awaits you!Halloween SEX Party [18+] is a casual game with original puzzle mechanics based on runners. Alongside it, this game features a juicy sex scenes, fascinating storyline in the unique setting of Halloween Horror.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Win 7, 8, 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i-3
  • 記憶體: 4096 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Gigabyte PCI-ex GeForce GT 710
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
